into_the_wild.name: St. James' Park
into_the_wild.description: A beautiful royal park in central London, perfect for walking and enjoying green space in the heart of the city.

into_the_wild.name: White Cliffs of Dover
into_the_wild.description: Stunning coastal cliffs near London offering dramatic scenic views and a memorable day trip experience.

gram_worthy_spots.name: The Monument
gram_worthy_spots.description: A historic monument standing 202 feet tall, located near Pudding Lane where the Great Fire of London started, with fascinating architectural details.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Natural History Museum
gram_worthy_spots.description: One of the most amazing and architecturally impressive buildings in London, featuring world-class museum exhibits in a stunning Victorian structure.

off_the_beaten_path.name: Chiswick
off_the_beaten_path.description: A neighborhood in London worth exploring by cycling or walking, offering a local perspective away from major tourist attractions.
